title: Heavy Duty Green PVC Gloves 27cm
shortDescription: Double dipped green PVC (Poly Vinyl Chloride) coating on a Jersey Cotton blend liner. Open wrist gauntlet cuff. Provides excellent resistance to most acids, oils, fats and petroleum hydrocarbons
description: Double dipped green PVC (Poly Vinyl Chloride) coating on a Jersey Cotton blend liner. Open wrist gauntlet cuff. Provides excellent resistance to most acids, oils, fats and petroleum hydrocarbons

features: Double dipped green PVC (Poly Vinyl Chloride) coating on a Jersey Cotton blend liner
Provides excellent resistance to most acids, oils, fats and petroleum hydrocarbons
Rough finish on the palm for grip especially in wet and oily handling conditions
PVC functions well between temperatures of -4°C & 66°C
attributes.composition: Green, double dipped PVC (Poly Vinyl Chloride); Jersey cotton blend liner
